# ia.sinc:2526
AAA
  TMP1:1 = INT_AND AL, 15
  TMP2:1 = INT_LESS 9, TMP1:1
  TMP3:1 = INT_OR TMP2:1, AF
  TMP4:1 = INT_MULT 6, TMP3:1
  TMP5:1 = INT_ADD AL, TMP4:1
  AL = INT_AND TMP5:1, 15
  AH = INT_ADD AH, TMP3:1
  CF = COPY TMP3:1
  AF = COPY TMP3:1

# ia.sinc:2527
AAD imm8
  TMP1:1 = INT_MULT imm8:1, AH
  AL = INT_ADD AL, TMP1:1
  AH = COPY 0
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP2:2 = INT_AND AL, 0xff
  TMP3:1 = POPCOUNT TMP2:2
  TMP4:1 = INT_AND TMP3:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP4:1, 0

# ia.sinc:2528
AAM imm8
  AH = INT_DIV AL, imm8:1
  AL = INT_REM AL, imm8:1
  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0
  TMP1:2 = INT_AND AL, 0xff
  TMP2:1 = POPCOUNT TMP1:2
  TMP3:1 = INT_AND TMP2:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP3:1, 0

# ia.sinc:2529
AAS
  TMP1:1 = INT_AND AL, 15

  TMP5:1 = INT_SUB AL, TMP4:1
  AL = INT_AND TMP5:1, 15
  AH = INT_SUB AH, TMP3:1
  CF = COPY TMP3:1
  AF = COPY TMP3:1

# ia.sinc:2532
ADC AL,imm8
  TMP1:1 = COPY CF
  CF = INT_CARRY AL, imm8:1
  OF = INT_SCARRY AL, imm8:1
  TMP2:1 = INT_ADD AL, imm8:1
  TMP3:1 = INT_CARRY TMP2:1, TMP1:1

  TMP4:1 = INT_SCARRY TMP2:1, TMP1:1
  OF = BOOL_XOR OF, TMP4:1

  SF = INT_SLESS AL, 0
  ZF = INT_EQUAL AL, 0

  TMP6:1 = POPCOUNT TMP5:1
  TMP7:1 = INT_AND TMP6:1, 1
  PF = INT_EQUAL TMP7:1, 0

# ia.sinc:4231
POPF
  TMP1:4 = segment(SS, SP)
  flags = *TMP1:4
  SP = INT_ADD SP, 2
  TMP2:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x4000
  NT = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP2:2, 0
  TMP3:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x800
  OF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP3:2, 0
  TMP4:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x400
  DF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP4:2, 0
  TMP5:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x200
  IF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP5:2, 0
  TMP6:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x100
  TF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP6:2, 0
  TMP7:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x80
  SF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP7:2, 0
  TMP8:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x40
  ZF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP8:2, 0
  TMP9:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x10
  AF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP9:2, 0
  TMP10:2 = INT_AND flags, 4
  PF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP10:2, 0
  TMP11:2 = INT_AND flags, 1
  CF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP11:2, 0

# ia.sinc:4232
POPF
  flags = *SP
  SP = INT_ADD SP, 2
  TMP1:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x4000
  NT = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP1:2, 0
  TMP2:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x800
  OF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP2:2, 0
  TMP3:2 = INT_AND flags, 0x400
  DF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP3:2, 0

  flags = INT_OR TMP35:4, TMP38:4
  TMP39:1 = INT_AND ID, 1
  TMP40:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP39:1
  TMP41:4 = INT_MULT 0x200000, TMP40:4
  TMP42:4 = INT_OR flags, TMP41:4
  TMP43:1 = INT_AND VIP, 1
  TMP44:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP43:1
  TMP45:4 = INT_MULT 0x100000, TMP44:4
  TMP46:4 = INT_OR TMP42:4, TMP45:4
  TMP47:1 = INT_AND VIF, 1
  TMP48:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP47:1
  TMP49:4 = INT_MULT 0x80000, TMP48:4
  TMP50:4 = INT_OR TMP46:4, TMP49:4
  TMP51:1 = INT_AND AC, 1
  TMP52:4 = INT_ZEXT TMP51:1
  TMP53:4 = INT_MULT 0x40000, TMP52:4
  flags = INT_OR TMP50:4, TMP53:4

  C0 = INT_OR C2, TMP4:1

  TMP9:XmmReg1.size = INT_AND XmmReg1:XmmReg1.size, TMP8:XmmReg1.size

ADCX Reg32, rm32
  # BUILD 0
  # BUILD 1
  TMP1:5 = INT_ZEXT Reg32:Reg32.size
  TMP2:5 = INT_ZEXT rm32:rm32.size
  TMP3:5 = INT_ADD TMP1:5, TMP2:5
  TMP4:5 = INT_ZEXT CF
  TMP5:5 = INT_ADD TMP3:5, TMP4:5
  TMP6:1 = SUBPIECE TMP5:5, 4
  CF = INT_NOTEQUAL TMP6:1, 0
  Reg32:Reg32.size = COPY TMP5:4
  # BUILD 2
